Source: A son of Guilliman knows only war!
A wretched creature deserves a wretched death.
Beg your gods for mercy! I have none!
Death is the reward for Heresy!
Death to the foes of Macragge.
Death to the foul warriors of Chaos.
Emperor be my shield and protector.
Heretic filth all bleed the same!
I am a weapon of the Emperor.
I am an angel of death.
I am an executioner of the Emperor.
I am cleansed in the blood of my enemies.
I am proud to serve, and proud to die!
I am the edge of his blade!
I am the point of his spear!
I am the wrath of the God Emperor.
I care not if this planet stands, so long as you die!
I have a bullet with your name on it!
I learned this from Calgar himself!
I send you to meet your foul god!
I will carve Regicide pieces from your bones!
I will crush you beneath my boot.
I will finish the work Captain Titus started!
I will make my brothers proud!
I will purge them for the Imperium!
I will wade through the blood of our enemies!
I'll cast your soul into the warp!
I'll paint the wall with your blood!
I'll purge the galaxy of your taint!
I'll tear you limb from limb!
It's time to drink Amasec and kill heretics! And I'm all out of Amasec!
Maim and obliterate until it is done!
Mine is the work of the righteous.
My fallen brothers geneseed will be avenged!
My love of the Imperium is matched only by my hatred of the Heretic!
No enemy of the Emperor escapes unpunished!
No heresy can touch a son of Ultramar!
None can stand against our hatred!
None can stand against the might of the Imperium.
Pain is temporary, Honour is forever.
Scour the stars of the heretic.
Sidonus laid down his life for this planet! I protect his sacrifice!
Smite the enemies of the Emperor.
Suffer not the heretics to live!
Tear out your heart! Spill your blood!
The Emperor sent me to redeem you! In holy fire!
The Emperor's hand will touch you and you will not survive!
The blood of martyrs is the seed of the Imperium.
The enemies of the Imperium will taste death this day!
The might of the Imperium will crush you!
The wrath of the Emperor shall be visited upon you!
There is always more killing to be done!
There'll be nothing left of you!
This is how a Space Marine fights!
Violence is the only answer I have!
When I'm finished, even your dark gods will reject you!
Whilst I draw breath, I stand. Whilst I stand, I fight. Whilst I fight, I prevail.
You are an abomination to be expunged.
You cannot escape the reach of my hatred!
You cannot stand against the Imperium of Man!
You will not live another day!
You'll drown in your own blood!
Your gods have forsaken you, traitor!
Your only mercy is a swift death!

A secret archive deep within the vault. This is where the fragment resides. You must reach it before the heretics and their daemonic allies. I hope we are not too late...
A trail through the mountains leads to the Habitation zone. Planetary defence batteries align the route. As do heretics. Find a way into the hab zone. Purge any resistance.

Down, down, into the very depths of corruption. The Daemonic Forge awaits, as does a legion of our wretched enemy. End the Chaos incursion, no matter the cost.
Emperor's Visage! His light shines upon you!

Forges of Corruption DLC required to access this save file.

Foul denizens of Chaos have seized a Manufactorum on Graia. You must gain access to the forge complex by any means necessary. Deliver the Emperor's judgement upon every heretic that dares stand in your way.
Gain Contempt by banishing Daemons back to the warp!
Game saved. Continuing on manual save
Grandfather Nurgle shared his gifts with you.
High toughness enemies resist your attacks more effectively. Use high strength weapons.
INCREASES YOUR DAMAGE AND REDUCES INCOMING DAMAGE.
Is there no end to the heresy that pervades this place? The information we seek is here, be the very walls themselves seem to turn against us. Find what we need before Chaos claims it.
It seems that whatever the Mechanicus were doing with the power source did not work out well for them. The halls of the dead are silent but for the sound of their enduring machines.
Jump at the end of a charge to leap further!
Keeping your Contempt above 100 confers an extra defensive bonus.
Launch forwards into enemies shoving them and dealing damage
Lost your way? Enable the Navigation Guide with <glyph id="NavigationGuide"/>.

MASH THE CHAINSWORD BUTTON AFTER YOUR WEAPON CONNECTS TO ENTER “CUTTING MODE” AND SAW THROUGH YOUR TARGETS.
CUTTING DEALS EXTRA DAMAGE.
Maglev freight rails connect the Imperium's outposts in this area. Make use of them to find the vault entrance. You must move quickly, Chaos forces are already searching the valley.
Maimed by a Blue Horror's claws.
Mash <glyph id="Melee"/> while using your chainsword to rev it. Cut the heretics to ribbons!
Missile Launcher ammo that causes a devastating implosion. (Forges of Corruption DLC only.)
NEVER RUN OUT OF AMMO (FOR A LIMITED TIME).
Not even a Primarch could survive!
Not even the Emperor himself could survive!
Obliterated by a Black Legion Havoc.
Offered up by an Aspiring Champion.
One of the loaders for the Crown's small arms. Chaos has spread even to this sacred device. The Mechanicus demand its restoration to proper functioning. You must be the one to do it.
Onwards, into the great smelting halls of the Manufactorum. Chaos have defiled Mechanicus assemblies to realize their own loathsome designs. Their heresy ceases on this day.
POWERS UP YOUR CHAINSWORD. CUT THEM TO PIECES.

POWERS UP YOUR WEAPONS. MACHINE SPIRITS CAN BE UNPREDICTABLE.
EVERY WEAPON IS AFFECTED DIFFERENTLY.
Pay glorious tribute to the Emperor by slaughtering the heretic hordes. How many rounds can you survive?
Picked up an all ammo crate
Plasmagun Cultists' weapons are poorly maintained. Shoot them while their shot charges to trigger an explosion.
Purchase the Forges of Corruption DLC to unlock this Chapter!
ROUNDS CAN PENETRATE WALLS AND TARGETS.
ROUNDS FIRE MUCH FASTER THAN NORMAL.
Rent asunder by a Chaos Marine.
Slimed by a Lesser Plague Toad.
Some secrets are concealed behind seemingly normal walls. Explore to find them.
Suit your weapon's strength to your enemy's toughness value.
Swap Left Stick and Right Stick

THE DAMAGE YOUR WEAPONS DEAL CHANGE BASED ON THE TARGET'S TOUGHNESS. 
USE OVER STRENGTH WEAPONS TO DEAL MORE DAMAGE. THIS EFFECT IS MAGNIFIED ON HIGHER DIFFICULTIES.
The Know No Fear ability recharges as you kill enemies.
The Grav-cannon uses an enemy's mass against them. Use it on tougher targets for greater effect.
The Lord Of Change claimed your soul.
The Manufactorum's towers convulse with Chaos blight. Fight your way to the colossal forge spire at the heart of the complex. Find the source of the corruption before it's too late.
The Plasmagun is stronger when overheating. Maintain fire for extra damage.
The Sorcerer has done something profane to the warp drive. A beam of chaotic energy is being vented directly into the sun. Ascend the device and reach the Sorcerer!
The Vortex grenade tears a hole between realspace and the Warp. Beware its devastating power.
The data we found indicates the entrance to the vault is located here. It looks to be of Mechanicus design. Perform the rituals of opening and get inside.
The enemies of the Imperium have triumphed.
The help screen in the options menu describes the function of relics.
The heretics have taken control of one of the Crown's promethium pipelines. The holy fuel must flow unimpeded. Reclaim it for the Emperor and continue your ascent.
The magistrate's bastion. The information we need will be here somewhere, now all you have to do is get inside. Shouldn't be too hard, looks like the heretics have managed it.
The only available route is through the hab's Mausoleum. Tread carefully through these sacred bones, who knows what spirits you might awaken.
The shard is inside some kind of vault in these canyons. Seek out any signs of Imperial presence and search for a means of ingress. Beware, the heretics will not be far behind.
The station's Mausoleum. The most hallowed Mechanicus remains from the Crown's attendants are interred here. A grim forbear of what is to come if we do not halt this foul incursion.
The streets are quiet, too quiet. The stench of heresy abounds. Looks like the local militarum's defences didn't fare too well. Descend through the Hab, purify it as you go.
The vault we're searching for is somewhere within these caves. They appear to have been formed by some kind of indiginous fauna. Stay vigilant and watch your step...
The vault! The fragment of the power source is somewhere within. You should proceed with haste, Throne knows what the Mechanicus were experimenting with down here.
These gun batteries can bring down anything in the Imperium's fleet and they're pointed directly at Graia. Kill the heretics controlling them before they can decimate the planet!

This bridge connects the hab to the magistrate's bastion. It's been heavily fortified against the daemonic invasion but is no longer under Imperial control. Push forward and clear it.
This galvanic temple is one of the Crown's many forges. Purging it of heretical influence will assist our defensive efforts.  Push forward and sanctify it in the name of the Emperor!
VISIONS OF THE EMPEROR BOLSTER YOUR CONTEMPT. RECEIVE A HUGE CONTEMPT BOOST.
We've regained control of much of the station but the Great Hall still holds a concentration of heretical forces. Cleanse it of their tainted influence and continue your search for the Sorcerer.
When its physical body is destroyed a Daemon is banished back to the warp.
Wireless controller has been disconnected. Please reconnect it
Would you like to turn on High Dynamic Range rendering?
Wounded enemies are less able to break out of chainsword attacks. Finish them!
You have located the xeno storage vaults. Be careful not to damage the many specimens contained within. You need not take such precautions with the heretics.
You're inside the Bastion. Its corrupt owner has quite the archive here. Search the deepest recesses of this foul place for information on the fragment's whereabouts.
You've identified a route to the Daemonic Forge. It's not an easy one. First you must navigate the prodigious construction sites of the Manufactorum, which are crawling with heretics...
You've made it aboard the Crown's main station. A pity you could not see it in better condition. Fight your way up through the smelting chambers and purify them of daemonic presence.
You've made your way out of the bowels of the Crown. Enter the Grand Elevator, find the controls and ascend. Beware it seems the heretics have already hitched a ride.
Your crusade draws to a close. The final battle is at hand. Heretics and Daemons pollute the command decks. Eliminate the Sorcerer, reclaim the Fragment and put an end to this heresy!
Your deployment to Graia didn't go quite as planned. No matter, secure armament, bolster your faith and continue. Those heretics don't know what's coming for them!
Your mission is complete. Thank you for playing Boltgun!
Your work is done. We should take some time to regroup aboard the Crown, who knows what will assail us next.
...And only in death does duty end.
99.99% probability of route achieving desired outcome of valuable progress.
